title: Varaha Cave Temple
tagline: Varaha Cave Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Varaha Cave Temple (i.e., Varaha Mandapa or the Adivaraha Cave) is a rock-cut cave temple located at Mamallapuram, on the Coromandel Coast of the Bay of Bengal in Kancheepuram Dist
overview.description: Varaha Cave Temple (i.e., Varaha Mandapa or the Adivaraha Cave) is a rock-cut cave temple located at Mamallapuram, on the Coromandel Coast of the Bay of Bengal in Kancheepuram District in Tamil Nadu, India. It is part of the hill top village, which is 4 kilometres (2.5 mi) to the north of the main Mahabalipurm sites of rathas and the Shore Temple. It is an example of Indian rock-cut architecture dating from the late 7th century. The temple is one of the finest testimonial to the ancient Hindu rock-cut cave architecture, out of many such caves also called mandapas.

topPlaces.name: Vedagiriswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Vedagiriswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva, located in Tirukalukundram (also known as Thirukazhukundram), Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Rudrakodisvarar Temple, Tirukalukundram
topPlaces.description: Rudrakodisvarar Temple, Tirukalukundram is a Siva temple in Tirukalukundram in Chengalpattu District in Tamil Nadu, India. This temple is also known as Urutthiran Temple, Rudhran Temple and Ruthrankoil.

topPlaces.name: Tirukalukundram
topPlaces.description: Tirukalukundram (Tamil: திருக்கழுக்குன்றம், romanized: tirukkaḻukkuṉṟam), also known as Tirukazhukundram, is a panchayat town and taluk head of Tirukalukundram taluk in Chengalpattu district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is famous for the Vedagiriswarar_Temple, a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Ottivakkam
topPlaces.description: Ottivakkam is a suburb of Chennai located south of Tirumani. It has a suburban railway station and falls under south line.

topPlaces.name: Tirumani
topPlaces.description: Tirumani is a suburb of Chennai located south of Chengalpattu, India. According to Census 2011 information the location code or village code of Thirumani village is 629867.

topPlaces.name: Ozhalai
topPlaces.description: Ozhalai is a village in Arcot taluk, Ranipet district, Tamil Nadu, India. As of the 2011 Census of India, it had a population of 447 across 111 households.

topPlaces.name: Chengalpattu
topPlaces.description: Chengalpattu, previously known as Chingleput or Chengalpet, is a town in Chennai metropolitan area and the headquarters of Chengalpattu district of the state Tamil Nadu, India. The town is located near the industrial and IT hub.

topPlaces.name: Chengalpattu taluk
topPlaces.description: Chengalpattu taluk is a taluk of Chengalpattu district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Chengalpattu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Varaha Cave Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Varaha Cave Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Varaha Cave Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (45 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (59 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Varaha Cave Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Varaha Cave Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Varaha Cave Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Varaha Cave Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Varaha Cave Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vedagiriswarar Temple, Rudrakodisvarar Temple, Tirukalukundram, Tirukalukundram, Ottivakkam, Tirumani.
